title: Finished base reveal — Sara: phase ONE done, phase TWO the BOAT
prompt: Wide hero shot on @beach-shore — dry golden sand. The completed @castle-rescue-base CENTER-BACK in all its glory: enormous multi-turret sandcastle with a deep moat, decorated with seashells, a small thin twig at the top with a tiny rectangular paper flag reading 'RESCUE'. Soft warm afternoon sunlight. @sara-beach already on the LEFT-FOREGROUND standing on the sand with both feet planted, both hands gently on her hips, sand softly on her cheeks, beaming with proud cheerful smile. Sara has exactly two arms and two hands visible — left hand on her left hip, right hand free at her side ready to point in BEAT 2. @eva-beach already on the RIGHT-FOREGROUND standing on the sand with both feet planted right next to Sara, also doing a proud hands-on-hips stance, beaming. Curly blonde hair with rainbow bow, sand softly on her cheeks. Eva has exactly two arms and two hands visible — BOTH hands on her hips throughout, NEVER off her hips, NEVER raising a finger. (BEAT 1 — 0-5s) Both girls stand proudly grounded on the sand looking at their finished base. (BEAT 2 — 5-10s) Sara (cheerful proud big-sister tone, raising one hand finger gently in the air): "Phase ONE — DONE!" Eva (cheerful nodding fast): "Phase TWO?" Sara (warm cheerful determined tone): "...the BOAT!" Both girls share a happy proud sister-look. Calm cheerful kid-show family ambiance throughout — soft seabird sounds, gentle distant surf. Preserve each character's silhouette and proportions throughout — no morphing of facial features, no shifting of hair or wardrobe, no color drift on clothing or skin tone. Keep all character bodies stable, consistent in scale, and locked to the same outfit and hairstyle from second 0 through the final second. STRICT ANATOMY: Sara has exactly two arms and two hands at all times. Eva has exactly two arms and two hands at all times. Both girls stay grounded with both feet on the sand throughout — no leaping, no jumping. The sand and castle stay plain clean — no marks, no red, no debris.
